API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.0.ANSWER: ChangeNOW menawarkan API bursa kripto terbaik untuk dompet, platform Web3, dan bursa. Solusi ini memberikan akses ke likuiditas dalam, dukungan untuk 1500+ aset, dan model bagi hasil untuk mitra, beroperasi secara non-kustodial.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.1.ANSWER: Kunci API adalah pengenal unik Anda yang memberikan akses sah ke ChangeNOW dan memungkinkan Anda mengintegrasikan fungsionalitas bursa ke dalam produk Anda. Kunci ini penting untuk mengakses dan berinteraksi dengan layanan bursa secara aman. Kami menekankan manajemen kunci yang aman: kunci harus unik, acak, tidak dapat ditebak, dan disimpan dengan aman di akun pengguna untuk mencegah akses tidak sah.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.2.ANSWER: Bergabunglah dengan Program Mitra kami dengan mendaftar di sini. Setelah mendaftar, Anda akan dapat melihat kunci Anda di detail Profil. Gunakan kunci Anda untuk mengintegrasikan solusi kami, dan siapkan jika Anda perlu meminta perubahan persentase atau mengaktifkan Nilai Tetap.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.SOLUTIONS.SECOND_CATEG: Dapatkan koin atau token Anda terdaftar di ChangeNOW dan akses 2.250.000+ pasangan bursa, eksposur ke ribuan mitra dan jutaan pengguna.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SCREEN.FAQ.0.CHAPT: Kami mendukung lebih dari 1500 cryptocurrency dan 110+ blockchain. Bahkan kombinasi yang paling langka pun mungkin!
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.3.ANSWER: Silakan lihat Halaman Status kami untuk melacak waktu aktif API publik kami, serta status aset yang didukung. Anda juga dapat berlangganan acara tertentu yang Anda minati, sehingga kami dapat memberi tahu Anda tentang perkembangannya. Jika Anda sudah menggunakan API bursa kripto kami, Anda juga dapat melihat status koin apa pun dengan titik akhir Available Currencies kami.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.4.ANSWER: Ya, opsi konfigurasi tergantung pada pengaturan produk dan model lalu lintas Anda. API dapat dikonfigurasi dengan batas kecepatan khusus dan parameter integrasi berdasarkan permintaan.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.5.ANSWER: Ya, API untuk bursa kripto kami tersedia tanpa biaya pengaturan atau bulanan, memungkinkan mitra untuk meluncurkan dan menguji integrasi tanpa investasi awal.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.6.ANSWER: ChangeNOW beroperasi menggunakan model non-kustodial untuk setiap integrasi API dan tidak menyimpan atau mengontrol dana pengguna. Semua transaksi ditangani tanpa mengambil hak asuh aset pengguna dan terus dipantau untuk stabilitas operasional.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.7.ANSWER: Integrasi bursa kripto dasar dapat diselesaikan dalam beberapa jam menggunakan dokumentasi yang tersedia. Pengaturan yang lebih canggih mungkin memerlukan waktu tambahan tergantung pada arsitektur, kompleksitas aliran, dan persyaratan kepatuhan.
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.9.ANSWER: Layanan ini tersedia secara global. Namun, ChangeNOW tidak menyediakan layanan kepada pengguna atau mitra dari Inggris karena persyaratan peraturan setempat. ChangeNOW mematuhi peraturan internasional yang diuraikan dalam Ketentuan kami, yang dapat mencakup persyaratan kelayakan dan kepatuhan khusus negara. Mitra harus meninjau Ketentuan untuk mengonfirmasi sumber lalu lintas yang diterima dan kelayakan hukum untuk yurisdiksi mereka.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SCREEN.FAQ.0.CHAPT:
Untuk pemilik bisnis:
  1. Daftar, dapatkan kunci API gratis dan integrasikan alat bursa kami ke dalam proyek Anda, baik itu dompet, bursa, atau bisnis web3 lainnya, dan dapatkan penghasilan dari setiap pertukaran pengguna. Pilih dari alat seperti API bursa kripto, widget bursa dan lainnya.
  2. Buat bursa kripto Anda sendiri, dompet kripto atau dApp: kami menawarkan solusi unik - jelajahi opsi label putih kami atau kit pengembang khusus untuk digunakan sebagai infrastruktur untuk proyek web3 Anda.

Untuk pengguna:
  1. Anda dapat membagikan tautan rujukan unik yang dibuat hanya untuk Anda di blog, halaman web, atau akun media sosial Anda dan mendapatkan bayaran untuk setiap pertukaran yang dilakukan melalui tautan Anda.
  2. Jika Anda memiliki situs web, Anda dapat mengintegrasikan widget bursa atau tombol dan mendapatkan penghasilan dari setiap pertukaran. Monetisasi lalu lintas Anda!
API_PAGE.QUESTIONS.8.ANSWER: Tidak ada batasan jumlah transaksi. Infrastruktur dirancang untuk mendukung penggunaan volume rendah dan aliran transaksi volume tinggi.
API_PAGE.FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
PROGRAM_AFFILIATE_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.ITEMS: Bagaimana program afiliasi kripto ChangeNOW membantu dompet kripto meningkatkan keuntungan?

Pantau laba, omset, dan semua transaksi yang diselesaikan melalui dasbor Anda dengan analitik waktu nyata. Dasbor Mitra Anda memberi Anda berbagai informasi untuk membantu melacak konversi, volume transaksi, pembayaran, dan penghasilan, menyediakan data transparan untuk mengoptimalkan kinerja integrasi Anda.

Program kami umumnya terbuka untuk mitra di seluruh dunia. Kami beroperasi sesuai dengan peraturan internasional dan persyaratan hukum setempat, yang dapat bervariasi menurut yurisdiksi. Mitra diharapkan mematuhi hukum yang berlaku dan harus meninjau Ketentuan Penggunaan untuk detail tentang persyaratan kelayakan dan kepatuhan.

Sebagai pemilik atau pengembang dompet, Anda dapat mengintegrasikan ChangeNOW Crypto Exchange sebagai bagian dari program kami langsung ke platform Anda. Anda mendapatkan komisi default 0,4% untuk setiap swap yang dimulai oleh pengguna Anda melalui integrasi ini. Pengaturan ini menghasilkan pendapatan pasif saat pengguna melakukan swap lintas rantai yang mulus dalam lingkungan dompet Anda.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SCREEN.FAQ.1.CHAPT: Integrasikan solusi adaptif kami dan beri pelanggan Anda akses ke lebih dari 1500 cryptocurrency dan nilai tukar yang kompetitif.

Bagaimana cara memilih program afiliasi kripto terbaik untuk komisi tinggi?

ChangeNOW sebagai program afiliasi kripto terbaik dirancang untuk membantu Anda membangun aliran pendapatan pasif yang berkelanjutan dengan mudah. Ini menawarkan komisi default yang tinggi, biaya integrasi nol, pembayaran instan, dan dasbor dengan analitik waktu nyata untuk membantu Anda memaksimalkan penghasilan.

ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: Apa layanan listing kripto terbaik?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: Apa yang terjadi setelah token kripto saya terdaftar di ChangeNOW?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Setelah aset Anda tersedia di ChangeNOW, aset tersebut dapat ditukarkan di platform. Ini mendapatkan eksposur ke audiens yang lebih luas, akses ke likuiditas dari penyedia terintegrasi, dan potensi peningkatan volume perdagangan. Ini juga memungkinkan peluang kemitraan, termasuk co-pemasaran dan keterlibatan komunitas, mendukung pertumbuhan lebih lanjut.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: Apa saja persyaratan untuk listing aset?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: Jika aset tidak memenuhi kondisi standar, ChangeNOW menyediakan layanan listing bursa kripto yang membantu mengaktifkan integrasi. Proyek dapat menggunakan Market Making atau Multichain Bridge untuk menyediakan likuiditas operasional dan mendukung fungsionalitas bursa. Tim juga dapat merekomendasikan pendekatan yang paling sesuai berdasarkan pengaturan aset.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Bisakah koin atau token dihapus dari daftar?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Persyaratan standar untuk listing bursa kripto di ChangeNOW tergantung di mana aset diperdagangkan. Aset harus tersedia di CEX atau DEX dan memiliki pasangan perdagangan yang didukung (seperti BTC atau USDT). Untuk aset DEX, pasangan harus mencapai setidaknya $100.000 dalam volume total. Untuk aset CEX, pasangan harus memiliki setidaknya $300.000 dalam volume perdagangan harian.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Ya. Aset dapat dihapus jika tidak lagi memenuhi persyaratan yang disepakati. Ini dapat terjadi jika volume perdagangan turun di bawah $100.000, proyek secara publik diidentifikasi sebagai penipuan, otoritas hukum meminta penghapusan, atau berdasarkan keputusan internal ChangeNOW. Tim dapat menghubungi untuk membahas situasi jika diperlukan. Anda juga dapat mempelajari lebih lanjut di Ketentuan Listing Aset kami.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: Berapa lama proses listing berlangsung?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: Berapa biaya untuk mendaftarkan koin atau token?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: Biaya tergantung pada kompleksitas integrasi dan waktu yang dibutuhkan untuk implementasi. Harga ditentukan secara individual untuk setiap aset. Mitra yang ada dapat menerima diskon berdasarkan volume bulanan mereka. Untuk menerima perhitungan harga untuk aset Anda, silakan isi formulir listing kami.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER:
Waktu listing bervariasi tergantung pada jenis jaringan dan kompleksitas integrasi. Kami umumnya mengikuti kerangka waktu berikut:
  • Token di jaringan populer seperti ERC20, BEP20, atau TRC20 biasanya memakan waktu hingga satu minggu.
  • Token di jaringan yang kurang umum biasanya memakan waktu sekitar dua minggu.
  • Integrasi blockchain penuh atau mainnet: membangun integrasi jaringan khusus memerlukan waktu antara dua hingga delapan minggu.
Tim kami memberikan perkiraan spesifik di awal proses setelah peninjauan aset awal.

AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Lacak status transaksi
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.SECOND.SUBTIT: Anda pasti ingin memeriksa apakah transaksi Anda berjalan lancar, terutama saat terburu-buru. Jangan khawatir, kami tetap siap membantu Anda. API status kami membuat pemeriksaan status semudah menyegarkan halaman web.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.THIRD.SUBTITL: Nikmati pertukaran 1.000+ mata uang, yang terintegrasi langsung ke dalam alat AI Anda. Kekuatan penuh ChangeNOW sekarang tersedia di mana saja – dari komputer rumahan Anda hingga chatbot pesan pribadi Anda.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FOURTH.TITLE: Dapatkan dukungan
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FOURTH.SUBTIT: Ada sesuatu terjadi? Jangan panik: basis pengetahuan kami yang kaya juga dapat diakses oleh AI. Cukup tanyakan asisten Anda – asisten akan menemukan jawaban atau mengarahkan Anda ke dukungan manusia 24/7.

AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.FIRST.TITLE: Manusia
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: AI membawa keajaiban ke dalam proses pertukaran rutin Anda dengan membuatnya lebih intuitif. ChangeNOW Buddy membantu orang mendapatkan perkiraan, membuat swap, dan memeriksa status transaksi mereka dengan lebih mudah.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Agen
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: ChangeNOW siap untuk generasi berikutnya dari keuangan berbasis AI. Toolset kami memberi agen cara terstandar untuk menemukan, memahami, dan berinteraksi dengan platform.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: AI mengakses ekosistem ChangeNOW secara real-time melalui titik masuk yang dioptimalkan.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.SECOND.TEX: Kemudian terhubung ke alur kerja kami dan mencocokkan permintaan Anda.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.THIRD.TEXT: Setelah semuanya jelas, AI menjalankan permintaan Anda dan menyelesaikan tugasnya!
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.TITLE: Mengapa menjadi AI-native
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Pembaruan rutin
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Server MCP kami memperluas kemampuan agen Anda dengan mengintegrasikannya dengan ChangeNOW. Proses pengaturan bervariasi untuk berbagai platform. Tanyakan kepada agen Anda apakah mendukung protokol MCP dan lampirkan URL server kami untuk petunjuk: mcp.changenow.io/mcp
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: Agen AI, dompet, asisten, dan alat otomatisasi membutuhkan lebih dari sekadar antarmuka tradisional. Mereka bekerja paling baik dengan MCP khusus, dokumentasi yang jelas dan terstruktur, serta skenario yang telah ditentukan.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Penemuan dan tindakan yang lebih mudah
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: Kami membuat ekosistem ChangeNOW lebih mudah ditemukan oleh agen, lebih mudah dipahami, dan lebih mudah untuk menjalankan alur kerja yang berorientasi pada kripto.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.THIRD.TITLE: Pengalaman yang lebih baik untuk semua orang
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.THIRD.TEXT: Bahkan jika Anda tidak menjalankan agen AI, Anda tetap dapat merasakan manfaat dari pembaruan ini! Sebagai contoh, ChangeNOW Buddy memungkinkan semua orang untuk berinteraksi dengan ekosistem. Tidak diperlukan pengaturan tambahan.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BUILT_FOR_SAFETY.TITLE: Dibangun untuk keamanan
Solusi AI kami tidak mengungkapkan atau berinteraksi dengan kunci pribadi Anda. Bahkan, tidak ada data sensitif yang diungkapkan sama sekali! Solusi AI & API kami hanya membuat pertukaran yang dapat diverifikasi dengan parameter yang ditentukan pengguna, tanpa melibatkan transaksi blockchain yang sebenarnya.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BUILT_FOR_SAFETY.LIST.SECOND: Semua alat kami diuji secara menyeluruh dan diinstruksikan untuk beroperasi sesuai dengan standar keselamatan. Kami mewajibkan AI untuk mengeluarkan ID pertukaran dan parameter lainnya, termasuk tautan langsung. Siapa pun dapat memvalidasi bahwa pertukaran yang dibuat sesuai dengan tujuan awal.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TITLE: Ekosistem untuk AI
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TEXT:
Visi jangka panjang kami adalah membuat seluruh ekosistem dapat diakses oleh AI. Apakah agen Anda perlu:
  • Mengintegrasikan gateway pembayaran NOWPayments
  • Mengontrol dompet non-kustodian dengan NOW Wallet
  • Akses langsung data blockchain melalui NOWNodes
  • Atau bahkan mengelola akun ChangeNOW Pro Anda
Semuanya dirancang untuk bekerja dengan mulus dan memastikan interoperabilitas.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TEXT.MO: Visi jangka panjang kami adalah membuat seluruh ekosistem ChangeNOW — termasuk NOWPayments, NOW Wallet, NOWNodes, akun Pro, dan lainnya — dapat diakses oleh AI. Tugas kripto apa pun yang Anda pikirkan, produk kami dirancang untuk bekerja sama dengan mulus, memastikan interoperabilitas di seluruh ekosistem.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: Bagaimana cara menggunakan ChangeNOW Buddy?
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: Halaman ini akan diperbarui secara rutin – menambahkan pembaruan produk AI, kemampuan MCP, dan dokumentasi alur kerja lainnya. Nantikan terus!
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: ChangeNOW Buddy adalah chatbot berbasis ChatGPT yang dapat diakses melalui situs web atau aplikasi ChatGPT. Ketentuan Penggunaan OpenAI berlaku, dan akun eksternal mungkin diperlukan.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Ini berarti bursa dibuat lebih mudah bagi sistem AI untuk ditemukan, dipahami, dan digunakan melalui antarmuka standar, dokumen publik, dan sumber daya yang dapat dibaca mesin.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: Kami terus bekerja untuk menyelaraskan dengan standar penemuan AI modern, seperti OpenAPI, LLMs.txt, dan lainnya. Ini memastikan bahwa agen AI Anda memahami layanan kami dengan jelas dan berinteraksi dengan andal.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Apakah ini hanya untuk pengembang?
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Tidak. Alat kami dirancang untuk semua orang yang menjalankan agen dan alat AI.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: Apa yang tersedia saat ini?
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: Sumber daya AI kami meliputi server MCP, ChangeNOW Buddy, spesifikasi OpenAPI, dan llms.txt.

SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: To bridge crypto, you will need to use a crypto bridge that supports the two blockchains you want to transfer assets between. First, select your source chain – say, Solana or Polygon – and the destination chain, such as Ethereum or Arbitrum. Then select the asset you want to bridge and confirm the transaction. For example, ChangeNOW's bridge chain solution makes cross-chain bridging easier with its fast and secure process.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: What does bridge mean in crypto?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: How to bridge Polygon to Ethereum?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: To bridge Polygon to Ethereum, you can use ChangeNOW's token bridge. Simply select Polygon as the source chain, Ethereum as the destination chain, choose your tokens, and confirm the transaction.

SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: The crypto bridge is designed to enable asset and data movement across different blockchains. Due to the isolated nature of blockchain platforms, interoperability is provided by a cross-chain bridge: it locks assets on one chain and issues its equivalent tokens on another.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How long does it take to bridge crypto?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: In the case of crypto bridging, this greatly depends on a blockchain network: over ChangeNOW, the most cross-chain bridging operations take less than 5 minutes to complete. However, congestion on networks like the Arbitrum bridge or Solana bridge can sometimes cause delays.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: Where can I bridge BTC with the Avalanche Bridge?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: ChangeNOW's token bridge solutions can facilitate swapping BTC for Avalanche-compatible assets quickly and securely.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: What is cross-chain?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Cross-chain refers to the interoperability between blockchains that allows seamless asset and data movement across networks. Bridges like those offered by ChangeNOW enable this process, which helps users swap tokens between different ecosystems, such as Ethereum, Solana, and Arbitrum.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: How does a cross-chain bridge work?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: A cross-chain bridge works by locking assets on the source chain and minting an equivalent amount on the destination chain. For example, if you use a defi bridge to move SOL from Solana to Ethereum, the bridge locks the original SOL and releases a bridge coin representing SOL on Ethereum (wrapped Solana, or wSol). Some bridges use liquidity pools to facilitate instant swaps without locking assets.

BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TITLE: Corporate Responsibility
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TEXT_1: We believe that the crypto industry should be based on the principles of transparency, mutual trust, and constant improvement.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TEXT_2: ChangeNOW seeks to maintain accountability to its customers, employees, and the broad crypto community. We do it through strict AML compliance, social change encouragement, regular service quality upgrades, and community involvement.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.CUSTOMER.TITLE: Customer
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.CUSTOMER.TEXT: We value our customers, protect them from scams, always advocate their interests, and help to keep their assets safe.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.COMMUNITY.TEXT:
We promote mass adoption of crypto and seek to turn the crypto world into
a healthy environment for collaboration and innovation.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.INDUSTRY.TITLE: Industry
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.INDUSTRY.TEXT: We believe that the crypto industry is no place for money laundering, dodgy schemes, and unlawful activities.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.split-yo: We help our customers to avoid double-spending caused by the BCH/BSV/BCHA unsplit coins problem. Even if the transaction has already gone through, we will try to return the funds within a 24-hour period, if it is physically possible.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CUSTOMERS.TEXT: Our key priority is protecting users from all kinds of scams, along with helping to deal with consequences of unfortunate network malfunctions. The ChangeNOW support team is available 24/7 and ready to give guidance to the customers who faced operational difficulties. We always return assets lost due to accidental sendings or unsplit coins transactions, for instance, in case of BCH/BSV/BCHA failed transactions.

Here at ChangeNOW, we do all in our power to help our customers restore justice in case a crypto fraud has been committed. ChangeNOW fully cooperates with the police and other executive bodies that investigate crypto-related crimes. We leave no stone unturned in order to help our customers get back what is rightfully theirs.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.COMMUNITY.TITL: Recognizing our responsibilities to the global community
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.COMMUNITY.TEXT: Raising trust towards the crypto industry is in our own hands. A way of contributing to the community that we find crucial is promoting mass adoption of crypto. In our ongoing efforts to accelerate the widespread use of digital currencies, we constantly improve the quality of our services and perfect customer relations. The ChangeNOW team wishes to establish trust within the industry and create a safe environment for crypto operations.

A fundamental part of community involvement is charity. We choose not to make a public display of our philanthropic initiatives, making an exception for the cases that affect us profoundly in some way. For one, we donated 1 BTC for Notre Dame restorations through our partner's charity fund. Another charitable collaboration of ours is Monero Instant Exchange: part of the service’s profits are donated directly to the Monero Project.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.INDUSTRY.TITLE: Over $16,500,000 returned in total
We are convinced that the crypto industry is no place for dirty money, unlawful operations, and shady business schemes. Despite the crypto community's common efforts, hacks and scams still frequently occur on the market, casting a shadow over the entire industry. However, we strongly believe that a scam-free future for crypto is quite conceivable. It will require a great deal of trust and a safe environment – and building them is exactly what ChangeNOW is aimed at.

The ChangeNOW team has put in place a number of AML mechanisms designed to detect fraud and filter suspicious transactions. We are not to disclose the exact KYT, KYC, and KYB procedures that every transaction undergoes for obvious security reasons.  To make sure no fraudulent activity escapes our notice, we use both an automated internal compliance check algorithm and an external AML-compliance provider.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.emerald-: On September 9th 2020, a DeFi project called Emerald Mine (EMD) committed an exit scam, appropriating nearly $2.5 million worth of crypto. 135020 EOS have been stopped on ChangeNOW, thanks to our risk management system.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.uniswap-: ChangeNOW is the first instant crypto exchange service to integrate a decentralized liquidity provider into its platform – Uniswap. This collaboration allows anyone to use ChangeNOW as a one stop bridge between ERC20 assets and easily swap tokens listed on Uniswap.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.the-stor: The Story of How a Cryptocurrency Exchange Service Lost Money, Intentionally

During the DOGE hype in the end of January 2021, ChangeNOW processed all the stuck DOGE transactions at the initial estimated rate, suffering substantial losses in order to deliver the service promised to the customers.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.report-o: Report on the Temporary Slowdown of BTC Processing

On August 6, 2021, one of the nodes crucial to Bitcoin exchange functionality on ChangeNOW temporarily stopped working. We had to activate two backup nodes before the service became fully operational again.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.changeno: ChangeNOW Returns $15M Lost in Compound Malfunction

After the Compound DeFi platform lost funds due to a bug, ChangeNOW received a 45505 COMP transaction request involving the misplaced COMP tokens. It had been flagged by our AML system, and we returned the assets to Compound.

In recent months, there have been numerous cases of Ripple giveaway scams where people lost huge amounts of money. ChangeNOW does its best to help victims, and here is how we helped return $100,000 worth of XRP to rightful owners.
ChangeNOW Returns 60 ETH Stolen by Phishing Uniswap App

Phishing, along with rug pulls and smart contract hacks, has been one of greatest threats to users’ funds in recent years. We managed to withhold compromised 60 ETH worth $210,000 at the time and return them to their rightful owner. Here is what happened.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.bitrue-p: $320,000 returned to Singapore-based crypto exchange Bitrue

After his exchange had suffered a hack, we established the malicious addresses and immediately blacklisted them. $320,000 were attempted to be transferred through ChangeNOW - we froze them and returned to Bitrue.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.upbit-ha: Money laundering prevented after Upbit hack

Soon after this South Korean crypto exchange was compromised, our risk prevention system stopped the test transaction of 9 ETH - we immediately froze the funds and transferred them to a secure storage.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.gatehub-: 500,000 XRP returned to a hacked wallet service

In June 2019, 2.5 million XRP from hacked GateHub crypto wallets were sent to us as fraudsters wanted to cash out. We managed to retain more than 500,000 XRP. These funds were returned to the wallet service.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.changeno: 100% of funds worth $500,000 retained upon Bithumb hack
When the exchange Bithumb was hacked, over $500,000 ended up on ChangeNOW. We froze all stolen deposits. They were stored in a secure cold wallet until an official request from law enforcement.
In September 2020, Eterbase exchange was hacked. Our risk management system stopped a transaction of 600,000 MATIC, that were subsequently returned to the exchange.
ChangeNOW Returns $100k to XRP Scam Giveaway Victims

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_COTI.ABOUT.TEXTS: First and foremost, COTI is a next-generation blockchain-based payment platform having a namesake native cryptocurrency. Since 2019, it helps companies to create advanced fintech solutions to save time and money. COTI Pay performs quick and safe payments, white label payment network allows creating one’s own proprietary payment system with smaller fees and greater control, and the blockchain-based loyalty networks increase the profits and customer retention.

The project started off in 2016, and its mainnet went live in 2019. Its co-founders, fintech specialists Samuel Falkon and David Assaraf, were inspired by Satoshi Nakamoto’s idea of a peer-to-peer payment network. The team is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
COTI’s market rank is 335. Its market cap is over $23MM, and the price is about $0.04. COTI’s all-time high equals $0,12.

Dock is run by a globally spread multicultural team of Dock Labs and governed by the Dock Association. Founded in 2017, the project aims at bringing more transparency and user-friendliness into the market of credentials.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_LITEX.ABOUT.TEXT: Litex is an ERC-20 token that functions with the help of the Ethereum network. It aims at building a decentralized crypto ecosystem. LXT implements layer2 technologies to achieve high performance by making micro-transactions off-chain. It also introduces low transaction fees by optimizing and upgrading the lighting network, and ensures security with methods stemming from cryptography and game theory.
Litex was launched in 2018 by a team with a strong IT and payment processing background. The project is advised by Bin Chen, the former PayPal architect.

Origin Protocol is a platform for building decentralized marketplaces. Its goal is to enable services that bring buyers and sellers together — just like Uber or Airbnb do — and make them work in a peer-to-peer fashion. It would result in lower fees and better accessibility, especially for the unbanked people. OGN network is based on the Ethereum and IPFS ones, and has an ERC-20 token.

Origin is run by a strong team that includes engineers from PayPal, YouTube, Dropbox, and Google. Its mother platform is supported by numerous investors and foundations: that makes OGN meaning a lot for a number of fields not limited to the ones associated with crypto.

ChangeNOW's fiat gateway services allow users to buy and sell cryptocurrencies using traditional fiat currencies like USD, EUR, and more. This service ensures a seamless bridge between the traditional financial system and the crypto world, making it easier for users to enter and exit the crypto market. Key specifics include:
  • Simple and quick transactions: Users can quickly buy crypto with fiat or convert crypto back to fiat.
  • Wide range of fiat currencies: Supports multiple fiat currencies to cater to a global audience.
  • Secure and compliant: Ensures high levels of security and compliance with regulatory.
  • No-KYC: ChangeNOW supports no-KYC (Know Your Customer) fiat-to-crypto exchanges up to 700 EUR!
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: How does ChangeNOW's fee structure work?
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
ChangeNOW prides itself on transparency with our fee structures. The exchange rates displayed include all fees, ensuring there are no hidden charges. These are the possible fees that are included in the transaction:
  • network fee for the deposit transaction from a customer's wallet;
  • network fee for transferring coins to our liquidity provider;
  • trading fees that our liquidity providers charge;
  • network fee for sending the exchanged funds to the customer.
The fees are competitive and reflect the service's commitment to providing value. The exact fee can vary based on the specific transaction, cryptocurrency pair, and market conditions. Users can always check the exact fee before confirming any transaction. Read more about ChangeNOW's fee structures.
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: How can I start integrating ChangeNOW into a new or existing project?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: How to integrate ChangeNOW into my dApp?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER:
To integrate ChangeNOW into your decentralized application (dApp), you can use the ChangeNOW API. Here’s how:
  • Get API Key: Register on the ChangeNOW platform to obtain your API key.
  • API Documentation: ChangeNOW offers comprehensive documentation that guides you through the whole integration process.
  • Implementation: Follow the step-by-step guide to implement the API, enabling crypto exchange functionality within your dApp.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: Are crypto exchanges dApps?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Not all crypto exchanges are decentralized. Traditional exchanges are centralized, meaning they are operated by a central entity. However, some exchanges, known as decentralized exchanges (DEXs), function as dApps, facilitating peer-to-peer trading without intermediaries.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How to create a dApp?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER:
Creating a dApp involves several main steps:
  • Choose a Blockchain: Select a blockchain platform like Ethereum or Binance Smart Chain.
  • Smart Contracts: Build smart contracts using languages like Solidity.
  • Development Tools: Utilize tools like Truffle or Hardhat for development.
  • Frontend and Backend Development: Create your app's front and back end.
  • Deployment: Deploy your smart contract, making your dApp accessible to users.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: What is a crypto exchange API?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
A crypto exchange API allows developers to integrate exchange functionalities into their dapps. The API provides endpoints for:
  • Exchange: Execute buy and sell orders.
  • Market Data: Retrieve real-time market information.
  • Account Management: Access and manage user accounts and transaction histories.
ChangeNOW offers a robust crypto exchange API for seamless integration.

BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.2.DES: There have been three halvings in Bitcoin history: in 2012, in 2016, and in 2020. By examining the aftermath of the previous halvings, investors and enthusiasts can gain valuable insights into possible trends and market behaviors. The last Bitcoin halving event in 2020 caused a substantial bull market that saw Bitcoin reach unprecedented highs, underlining the significant impact halving events can have on market sentiment and valuation. With each of previous halvings investors became more and more bullish, though it's important to remember that past performance is not always indicative of future results. Always DYOR! : )
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.3.TIT: How to Keep Updated during the Bitcoin’s 4th Halving
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.3.DES: Trading around the Bitcoin halving demands a nuanced understanding of cryptocurrency markets and the specific factors that drive Bitcoin's price. The halving reduces the rate at which new bitcoins are created and thus, the rate at which the total supply grows. This reduction in supply growth could lead to increased demand and, potentially, higher prices (be aware of possible risks while trading!) if demand for Bitcoin continues to grow at a steady rate or increases. However, market dynamics are influenced by numerous factors, making precise predictions challenging. Platforms like ChangeNOW facilitate the crypto exchange process by offering a user-friendly interface and instant exchange options, allowing traders to swiftly respond to market movements caused by the halving.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: How Investors Should Prepare for BTC Halving 2024?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Investors should monitor the halving countdown, stay informed on market trends, and consider diversifying their investment strategies to mitigate risks and capitalize on potential opportunities presented by the halving event.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: How are Miners Preparing for Bitcoin Halving 2024?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Miners are investing in more energy-efficient mining hardware and exploring renewable energy sources to reduce operational costs and improve profitability in anticipation of reduced block rewards.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How Many Bitcoin Halvings are Left?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: The halving process will continue approximately every four years until the last Bitcoin is mined around 2140, leaving several more halvings to anticipate.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: What Happened the Last Time Bitcoin Halved?

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_CRYPTO_COM.ABOUT: The Crypto.com project was launched in 2018 and as of 2020, it stands as one of the top 50 companies on the cryptocurrency market. It leverages technology to build scalable solutions so as to enable wider adoption of cryptocurrency and blockchain. It provides different instruments including crypto deposit services, Visa cards, blockchain-powered payment integrations, etc., so as to bring mainstream adoption to cryptocurrency transactions.

The ticker symbol of Crypto.com is represented as CRO. Its blockchain has scalability at its core by supporting more than 50,000 transactions per second. The project allows for a blockchain-based payment system for merchants that allows lower transaction fees, international payment transfers, and streamlining crypto payments.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_BITCOIN_CASH.ABO: Launched in 2017, Bitcoin Cash is a split of the prominent cryptocurrency Bitcoin. The concept of Bitcoin Cash was propagated by developers with concerns over scalability in the BTC blockchain. This led to a hard fork in the Bitcoin blockchain and thus came Bitcoin Cash (BCH). It offers the same principal features as Bitcoin, but with greater potential of scalability in its blockchain network.

BCH enables larger block size and thus possesses the capacity to process transactions at a faster scale. The shorter transaction time also leads to lower transaction fees. Over the years, Bitcoin Cash has also incorporated new features including increasing the amount of data stored on each block and facilitating developers to create new tokens on its blockchain.

How to exchange Bitcoin for cash

If you want to withdraw Bitcoin in cash, there are special Bitcoin ATMs installed all around the world, you can check if there is one in your area. ChangeNOW will implement fiat withdrawals by Q4 2020.
What is the Bitcoin exchange rate

You can check the current Bitcoin exchange rate in our exchange window, just type in the desired amount of BTC you want to exchange. Note that you can choose classic exchange rate, if you want to get the best deal at the moment of exchange or fixed rate, if you want to get the exact amount displayed.
How to start a Bitcoin exchange
To initiate Bitcoin exchange simply open ChangeNOW, select currencies you want to exchange, choose classic or fixed rate, tap on the ‘Exchange’ button and follow the instructions.
There are plenty of ways to exchange cryptocurrencies, however all of them have some disadvantages. Custodial exchanges are convenient, but they require registration and you hold your assets with personal information on a third party server. You can exchange it peer to peer without any mediator, however all the risks in this case are also on you.

The most secure way to exchange crypto is by using a non-custodial exchange that does not require registration, does not take hold on your funds and has earned users’ trust - such as ChangeNOW.
How to buy Bitcoin without an exchange

You can look for a cryptocurrency ATM in proximity to your location, or find a cryptocurrency broker to do it for you. If there aren’t any - use ChangeNOW, as it is always in your pocket and ready to help.

BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: The process is a part of Bitcoin's algorithmic approach to simulating scarcity, an essential principle for its value proposition. By halving the block rewards, Bitcoin mimics the extraction process of precious metals, becoming more scarce and theoretically more valuable over time. This scarcity principle is crucial for Bitcoin's value proposition as a hedge against inflation and a store of value.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_BCH.TEXT_2: People new to crypto often find it hard to distinguish between Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Bitcoin (BTC). The key difference is that Bitcoin (BTC) is the older chain, while the latter is a fork. While this coin was created in July 2017 through a hard fork of Bitcoin, the concept of it dates back to as far back as late 2015. At the time, there were growing concerns about Bitcoin’s scalability, and a section of the community wanted to accommodate more transactions by expanding the block size. One of the key proponents of a block size increase was Roger Ver (the main figure behind it). When consensus failed, Ver and like-minded investors forked Bitcoin and created Bitcoin Cash, a similar chain, but with a bigger block size. Since its launch, this coin’s price has moved in tandem with the rest of the crypto market and hit an all-time high of $4,355.62 in December 2017. It has since dropped and ranks, 5th, with a market cap of $5.493 billion. You can check out our 2020 Bitcoin Cash price prediction here.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_BCH.TEXT_4: The main defining feature for this chain is scalability due to having a larger block size. This makes it one of the most reliable networks that can run without lagging due to congestion. It also has low transaction fees, and is one of the most secure blockchains in the market.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_LRC_ARTICLE: Loopring is a decentralized finance platform created to enable crypto movement between exchanges. It is not a traditional decentralized exchange, but rather a non-custodial order book running on Ethereum. LRC is a DeFi native token of the platform that is paid to miners, who ensure the order completion or cancellation on the Loopring DeFi system. LRC is a decentralized finance token that can settle transactions outside of the Ethereum network, hence lowering gas costs.

In August 2014, he did a crowd sale and cryptocurrency was born on the 30th of July, 2015. Like most crypto projects, this one has had its ups and downs in the course of its existence. The original chain continued as Ethereum Classic, while the new chain became the popular cryptocurrency as it is today. Pricewise, currency has recorded significant gains over the last decade. One of its key features is its ring signatures. This is the way of ensuring that transactions cannot be traced back to the sender. Essentially, it's like putting a hundred fingerprints on a dollar note making it impossible to determine who it belongs to. Another interesting feature is the Public-View feature. This feature allows the sender to let other people see their public address if the need arises. This feature lowers the risk of the project getting in trouble with regulators due to its highly advanced privacy capabilities. 
It also has an in-built scalability feature. This works by allowing the network to review all past transactions and automatically make changes to the block-size to factor in an increase in transaction volumes.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_3: It is the 3rd largest cryptocurrency by market cap. It is also one of the oldest cryptocurrencies in existence, because the idea is a little older than Bitcoin itself. In 2005, Jed McCaleb came up with the idea of a financial services system that would act as a secure mode of payment for online transactions. He then approached Arthur Britto and David Schwartz, who built it with the help of Ryan Fugger, who as far back as 2005, had built such a system and named it Opencoin. It is the Opencoin system that formed the basis of Ripplelabs, and the cryptocurrency that debuted in the crypto markets as Ripple in 2012. Like most cryptocurrencies, XRP became most visible to the masses during the 2017 crypto rally. At the time, the crypto rallied to a high of over $3.5 on December 29th, 2017, and with a market cap of $73 billion. Like other cryptocurrencies, it has since corrected and currently has a market cap of about $13.67 billion.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_5: The currencies ledger has several features that put it at the forefront of the crypto revolution. One of its key features is speed. This currency is one of the fastest ways to send money globally. One can send money using it to any part of the world in under 4 seconds. Related to speed is the feature of scalability. A major advantage that centralized systems such as Visa have over cryptos is that of scalability. Most blockchains can handle very few transactions per second, making them impractical for large scale use in the finance industry. XPR does not have this problem and can consistently handle more than 1500 transactions per second. In fact, as of July 15th, 2019, it could handle over 65,000 transactions per second, making it competitive as a global payment system. The other key feature is decentralization. In the past, there were concerns that XRP is a centralized coin where RippleLabs controls all the validator nodes. This notion has since been dispelled as the network is run by more than 150 independent validators spread across the world. It is also for this reason that back in 2018, there was a rebranding from Ripple (XRP) to XRP (XRP). The goal was to help investors understand the difference between the company and the coin. Lastly, it is eco-friendly. Unlike proof-of-work coins that require energy to produce, the currency’s ledger settles transactions without mining.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_MKR_ARTICLE: Maker is a DeFi platform that is used to maintain the DAI stablecoin. DAI coin is based on smart contracts powered by Ethereum and Maker is a decentralized finance tool that stabilizes the price of DAI by creating new MKRs. DeFi protocols in place regulate the price of the stablecoin in a transparent way with collateralized loans. MKR as a decentralized finance instrument is one of the oldest on the market - it was created in 2014 and has since earned its popularity in the crypto community at large.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_LEND_ARTICLE: Aave is a DeFi protocol that is used to offer instant credit. Based on Ethereum, LEND is a decentralized finance tool working on a collateralized lending system. DeFi makes borrowing money simple - lenders provide liquidity by depositing money into a pool, while borrowers that need a loan have to provide collateral in other currency. Aave has been a household name in decentralized finance space since 2017, and has grown significantly over the years it’s been on the market.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_SNX_ARTICLE: Synthetics Network Token is a decentralized finance protocol based on Ethereum. SNX’s DeFi system is similar to Maker, where the platform’s tokens are used to create assets called Synths. Those synthetic assets copy the price of ‘real world’ assets. To buy and trade those, one has to use SNX - the decentralized finance token of the platform. The Synthetix DeFi project initially started as a conventional stablecoin Havven that got rebranded in late 2018.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_COMP_ARTICLE: Compound is a decentralized finance lending platform that supports multiple cryptocurrencies. Its native DeFi asset COMP (or cToken) is used as a basis of the Compound DeFi platform. Ethereum-based Compound offers decentralized governance on a blockchain. To vote for any changes to be made on the decentralized finance platform, COMP tokens should be bought with fiat or other cryptocurrencies.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_KNC_ARTICLE: An Ethereum-based Kyber Network is a decentralized finance project that provides instantaneous token exchange. Kyber Network’s DeFi protocol supports 70+ ERC20 projects and swiftness of conversion is provided by crypto funds called reserves. In order to use reserve pools, one has to pay a fee in the ecosystem’s native token, KNC. Decentralized finance projects like Kyber make usage of different dapps easy, as you don’t have to wait for token swaps and tools like KNC bring DeFi closer to everyday adoption of crypto payments.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_YFI_ARTICLE: In the decentralized finance space, Yearn.Finance is commonly known as Bitcoin of DeFi due to its price. YFI is an Ethereum ERC20 token that is used for community governance of the ecosystem. Yearn.Finance as a DeFi project stands out as a highly decentralized blockchain, where all decisions are made by the community. This is a good example of a well-organized decentralized finance space. The YFI token also stands out due to the fact that there was no ICO or pre-mine ever.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_REP_ARTICLE: Augur is a decentralized finance prediction platform running on Ethereum. Augur’s DeFi functionality has two uses: to create markers and to trade on events. For a small fee in Ethereum, Augur’s users can create a market for any asset they wish. Augur’s DeFi token called REP is used to pay for the odds of trading events happening. With REP at the decentralized platform’s heart and versatile options for prediction bets and markets creation, Augur is one of the most interesting projects in the niche right now.

BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: What Happens to Miners When the Bitcoin Reward is Halved?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: What Happens When All 21 Million Bitcoins Have Been Mined?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: Miners face a significant challenge as the reward for their efforts is reduced, potentially impacting the profitability of mining operations. This adjustment period encourages technological innovation and efficiency improvements among miners, who must optimize their operations to maintain profitability under the new reward structure. Some miners may exit the market, leading to a temporary reduction in the network's hash rate until equilibrium is reached.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: Reaching the 21 million cap is a long-term prospect, expected around the year 2140. After this point, miners will no longer receive new bitcoins for block rewards and will rely solely on transaction fees as compensation for their role in processing transactions and securing the Bitcoin network. This shift could fundamentally change the economics of mining and Bitcoin's security model.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.7.QUESTION: Why Does Bitcoin Halve?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSWER: The halving mechanism is Bitcoin's solution to prevent inflation and ensure a controlled supply, similar to the way central banks manage the supply of traditional currencies. By halving the block reward, Bitcoin ensures that its total supply will never exceed 21 million coins, making it a deflationary asset by design. This scarcity is a key factor driving Bitcoin's adoption and valuation as a digital store of value.

PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSW: Yes! All ChangeNOW assets are interexchangeable, including cross-chain swaps. You can create a Permanent Exchange with any asset pair supported on ChangeNOW.

PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUES: What will happen if I occasionally send funds in a wrong asset?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSW: No worries, we’ve got you! Depending on your particular case, we can either process the transaction normally or suggest a refund to your address. PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.7.QUES: Can I use Permanent Addresses with ChangeNOW API?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSW:
Yes – as a partner, you can operate Permanent Exchange Addresses through our API and use them as a business. You can see API documentation here. There are several ways you can benefit from our solutions. For example, you can automatically convert the payments you receive into your target currency without any manual operations. More use cases are outlined on this page above.

For more info, you are always welcome to reach out to us at partners@changenow.io, we will be happy to answer any questions you’re interested in.

PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUES: What exchange fees apply to Permanent Addresses?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSW: The fees are the same you would see with a regular exchange: network fees and service fees. They are already included in the estimated rate you see. We guarantee no extra charges in the process – what you see is what you get.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUES: What is the maximum amount I can exchange?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSW: There is no limit to the amount you send – the system will process the exact amount of funds that was sent to the deposit address and pay it out to you in the target currency.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSW: Sure! Our minimal amounts start with just $2 depending on the exchange pair.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUES: Can I share my Permanent Addresses with other individuals?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSW: Yes – the sender and the receiver of the funds do not have to be the same person. Use this to convert automated deposits instantly and receive the funds directly in your target currency.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUES: How can I track the process and view my exchange history?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSW:
The process can be tracked on the exchange page once you create it. Your exchange history is shown on the same page, so we recommend to bookmark it.
Additionally, all of your exchange history is stored in your Pro account – sign up and track you transactions with ease.

BITCOIN_HALVING.TIMER.ADDITIONAL_TEXT: Gear up for the monumental Bitcoin Halving 2024, a cornerstone event in the Bitcoin ecosystem, when the reward for mining bitcoins will be halved from 6.25 to 3.125 bitcoins. This event is pivotal, influencing Bitcoin’s inflation rate, scarcity, and potentially its market value. Let's dive  into the heart of Bitcoin's evolution with the 2024 Bitcoin Halving, exploring its impact on Bitcoin investment, Bitcoin's blockchain technology, and the broader financial markets.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.INTRO_TEXT: The Bitcoin Halving 2024 event stands on the horizon as a monumental occurrence within the cryptocurrency realm, symbolizing a crucial phase in the Bitcoin network's lifecycle that enthusiasts, investors, and financial strategists eagerly anticipate. This event, integral to Bitcoin's unique economic model, serves to maintain its deflationary nature by methodically decreasing the rate at which new bitcoins are introduced to the market. Specifically, the Bitcoin Halving 2024 will witness the reward for mining new blocks being halved from the current 6.25 bitcoins to 3.125 bitcoins, a change that directly affects miners but also has broader implications for the Bitcoin market and its valuation.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.0.DES: A Bitcoin halving event is a fundamental aspect of Bitcoin's design, occurring every four years, after all 210,000 blocks are mined. This mechanism ensures a gradual reduction in the rate of new bitcoins generated, extending the total time it will take for all bitcoins to be mined. It's a critical feature that helps combat inflation and mimic the natural scarcity properties of physical commodities such as  gold, making Bitcoin a 'digital gold' for the modern era. The halving is not just a technical event; it's an important moment that has historically influenced Bitcoin's price and various aspects of the cryptocurrency ecosystem.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.1.TIT: When is the Next Bitcoin Halving?
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.1.DES: Projected to occur in the third week of April 2024, the exact date of the next Bitcoin halving depends on the mining activity and can slightly vary. Cryptocurrency platforms and analysts closely monitor the Bitcoin blockchain to provide accurate countdowns and forecasts, preparing investors for the event. This anticipation builds a unique market environment where speculation, strategy, and historical data converge to forecast the potential outcomes of the halving.
BITCOIN_HALVING.DISCLAIMER: Disclaimer: Nothing presented on this page represents any kind of investment advice and is merely the opinion of the author. Investing into crypto is a high-risk activity and should be done only after extensive research.

SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.MAIN.DESCRIPTION: Cash out BTC effortlessly with our reliable crypto exchange service. 🚀 Enjoy competitive rates, transparent fees, and a smooth, secure process trusted by thousands worldwide.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.USERS.TEXT: Our BTC-to-fiat service is tailored for anyone needing fast, secure, and simple crypto cashouts.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.USERS.ITEMS.0.TITLE: Crypto investors
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.USERS.ITEMS.1.TITLE: Traders
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.USERS.ITEMS.3.TITLE: Freelancers
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.USERS.BOTTOM_TEXT: and anyone who needs real-world money — fast!
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.ITEMS.0.TEX: On ChangeNOW, you can exchange Bitcoins for cash and receive your payout in under 15 minutes. It's the fastest way to turn Bitcoin into fiat with zero hassle.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Yes, to turn Bitcoin into cash on ChangeNOW, you need to register with ChangeNOW Pro. This quick and simple process is required to comply with regulations and ensure the security of your transactions.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.ITEMS.1.TEX: We offer low fees and full pricing transparency. What you see is what you get — no hidden commissions when you exchange Bitcoin for cash.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.ITEMS.2.TEX: You can cash out your cryptocurrencies to Visa, Mastercard, or your bank account. We support fast and secure global payouts.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.USERS.TITLE: For Whom Is Our Cashing Out Service?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: What fiat currencies are supported?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: Are there any fees?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER:
Yes, there are fees involved in any crypto-to-fiat conversion. But they’re transparent and included in the final amount you see before confirming the transaction. This means you won’t face any surprise deductions later.

The fees typically cover network transaction costs, payment processing, and exchange service fees. Overall, they remain competitive and fair, especially when compared to traditional crypto exchanges or P2P platforms that often include additional withdrawal or service fees.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.ITEMS.3.TEX: Our service is non-custodial, meaning you remain in full control of your funds. We work with reliable third-party fiat providers to make sure your crypto journey stays smooth from start to finish. All data is encrypted, and the process is trusted by millions worldwide.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.ITEMS.4.TEX: Sell BTC for fiat currencies like USD, EUR, GBP, AUD, and more than 70 others. Convert Bitcoin to cash in just a few clicks — and get real money to spend, invest, or save.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.TITLE:
Simple & Fast BTC to Fiat:
We Know How to Sell Bitcoin for Cash
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.ADVANTAGES.TEXT: Discover the easiest way to sell Bitcoin for fiat. Learn how to convert BTC to cash quickly, securely, and with low fees — whether to your card or bank account.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.STEPPER.FIRST_DESCRIPT: Enter how much Bitcoin you want to sell for fiat — just specify the amount, and we’ll calculate the exact value in your chosen currency instantly.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.STEPPER.SECOND_TITLE: Select fiat currency and payout method
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.STEPPER.SECOND_DESCRIP: Choose USD, EUR, or any supported fiat. Select Visa, Mastercard, SEPA, SWIFT, PayPal, and more. The system will calculate its current value in fiat currency.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.STEPPER.THIRD_DESCRIPT: Check the final exchange rate with all fees included upfront. After confirmation, the fiat amount will be transferred to your selected payout method, often within just 15 minutes.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.PRICE_CALCULATOR.TITLE: Price calculator
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.PRICE_CALCULATOR.TEXT: Preview the amount of fiat you'll get before selling Bitcoin for cash. Enter your BTC and select a currency to see live exchange rates.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.REVIEWS.TEXT: Thousands of users choose ChangeNOW to convert crypto to fiat thanks to our speed, simplicity, and trust. With over 12,000 reviews and a 4.5 rating on TrustPilot, it’s clear — BTC sellers know they’re in good hands.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: Can you sell Bitcoin for real money instantly?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Yes, most BTC-to-fiat transactions are completed within 15 minutes or even faster!
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER:
ChangeNOW supports a wide range of fiat currencies for your convenience. You can convert Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies into:
  • USD (US Dollar)
  • EUR (Euro)
  • GBP (British Pound)
  • AUD (Australian Dollar)
  • BRL (Brazilian Real)
  • INR (Indian Rupee)
  • and 70+ other local and global currencies

This wide selection makes it easy to withdraw funds in your native currency, no matter where you are in the world.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: One of the most trusted and user-friendly platforms for converting BTC to cash is ChangeNOW. It’s a secure, non-custodial crypto exchange that supports over 70+ fiat currencies and offers instant payouts. Whether you want to cash out BTC in USD, EUR, GBP, or local currencies like INR or BRL, ChangeNOW has you covered.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Do I need verification to sell BTC for fiat?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER:
Creating a Pro account takes just a few minutes and unlocks powerful benefits:
  • Cashback on every exchange — earn up to 0.2% back in NOW tokens
  • Unlimited crypto loans — borrow instantly without fixed repayment terms
  • Personal transaction history — track and manage your activity, and more!
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: How to convert Bitcoin to fiat?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: The process of converting Bitcoin to fiat is very simple, even for beginners. Select BTC, choose payout in cash, confirm the rate, and receive money to your card or bank account.
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.7.QUESTION: How long does it take to get money off Bitcoin?
SELL_CURRENCY.BTC.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSWER:
Generally, to trade Bitcoins for cash takes around 5–15 minutes when sending money to a bank card like VISA or Mastercard. However, in some cases, especially with bank transfers.

Still, platforms like ChangeNOW are optimized for speed and reliability. They make the process of turning BTC into cash as quick and hassle-free as possible.
